_comment: Copy this file to ~/.openclaw/llm-pricing.json and fill in the models you use.
_format: Keys are 'provider:model' (matching OpenClaw's provider/model identifiers). Values are prices in USD per 1M tokens (MTok).
_priority: Entries here take priority over OpenRouter API pricing. Use this to override incorrect prices or add models not on OpenRouter.
_hot_reload: Changes to this file are picked up automatically — no gateway restart needed.
